name: json-fragments
description: Find, highlight, and preview JSON fragments embedded in any text file.

commands.title: JSON Fragments: Scan Visible JSON Fragments
JSON Fragments: Toggle Highlight for File
JSON Fragments: Toggle Temporary Highlight for Focused Files
JSON Fragments: Toggle Inline Syntax Highlight for File
JSON Fragments: Toggle Temporary Inline Syntax Highlight for Focused Files

json-fragments.hover.enabled.description: Show a formatted JSON preview when hovering over a detected JSON fragment.

json-fragments.scanner.includePrimitiveA.description: Treat empty arrays and arrays containing only primitive values as JSON fragments.

json-fragments.scanner.includeEmptyObjec.description: Treat empty objects such as {} as JSON fragments.

json-fragments.files.filterMode.description: Choose how file include and exclude glob patterns control where the extension is active.

json-fragments.files.include.description: Glob patterns for files where the extension is active when filter mode is include. Examples: **/*.log, dev/examples/**.

json-fragments.files.exclude.description: Glob patterns for files where the extension is inactive. Excludes always take priority over includes.

json-fragments.preview.maxOpenStaticPrev.description: Maximum number of open static preview tabs. -1 means unlimited, 0 prevents opening new previews.

json-fragments.tracker.autoHighlightVisi.description: Automatically highlight JSON fragments in the visible ranges of the active editor.

json-fragments.tracker.autoHighlightDebo.description: Delay in milliseconds before rescanning visible ranges after editor and document events.

json-fragments.tracker.viewportLookahead.description: Scan additional lines around visible editor ranges. 0 scans only visible ranges, 1 scans one extra viewport above and below.

json-fragments.inlineSyntaxHighlighting..description: Automatically highlight JSON syntax tokens inside detected fragments in the visible ranges of the active editor.

scripts.compile: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js
scripts.package: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js --production
scripts.pretest: npm run compile-tests && npm run compile && npm run lint
